HTML.SafeEmbed TYPE: bool VERSION: 3.1.1 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Whether or not to permit embed tags in documents, with a number of extra security features added to prevent script execution. This is similar to what websites like MySpace do to embed tags. Embed is a proprietary element and will cause your website to stop validating; you should see if you can use %Output.FlashCompat with %HTML.SafeObject instead first.</p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
